name_en: 【Dynamic Changeable Chip Top-tier Original Enhanced Version】M24141 White with Pink M46288 Black M46277 Apricot M47180 Elephant Grey CarryAll Small Handbag Crafted from Monogram Empreinte embossed leather, the spacious design features a neat interior and a large inner pocket for added functionality. Paired with a Monogram embossed clutch secured by a leather strap. A perfect companion for urban life. Dimensions 29 x 24 x 12 cm (Length x Height x Width)
